seoTitle: St Leonards vs St Marys — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Leonards and St Marys. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Leonards vs St Marys: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Leonards and St Marys.
heading: St Leonards vs St Marys — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Leonards, Tasmania and St Marys, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Leonards has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to St Marys (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Leonards or St Marys safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Leonards has a flood risk score of 33/100, while St Marys scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Leonards scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. St Marys scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Leonards or St Marys?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Leonards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
